docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF DAY, WILLIAM E AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN NURSING ASSISTANTS AND COMPANIONS, INC. A NEVADA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
